# silenceper

> silenceper 的技术文章、AI 工具观察和开源项目实践。

Base URL: https://silenceper.com/
Language: en-US
Author: silenceper

This file is a compact map for AI agents and search assistants. Prefer canonical URLs from this site when citing content.

## Main Sections

- [Articles](https://silenceper.com/en/article/): AI tools, open source project notes, and practical introductions.
- [Blog](https://silenceper.com/en/blog/): Long-form engineering notes and implementation records.
- [Topics](https://silenceper.com/en/topics/): Curated reading paths across related posts.
- [WeChat SDK](https://silenceper.com/en/wechat/): WeChat SDK documentation and usage notes.

## Topics
- [AI Agent Tools](https://silenceper.com/en/topics/ai-agent/): AI agent tools, automation workflows, and practical implementation notes.
- [OpenClaw Practice](https://silenceper.com/en/topics/openclaw/): Introductory guides, skills, and practical notes around OpenClaw.
- [SEO / GEO Growth](https://silenceper.com/en/topics/seo-geo/): SEO, GEO, content growth, and visibility optimization practices.

## Recommended Recent Content
- [OpenAI's Image Verification Tool: Adding Source Context to AI-Generated Images](https://silenceper.com/en/blog/2026-05-21-openai-verify-image/): OpenAI's image verification tool checks for C2PA content credentials and SynthID watermarks to help determine whether an image may have been generated by OpenAI tools.
- [Marketing Skills for AI Agents: A Marketing Workflow Pack for AI Agents](https://silenceper.com/en/article/2026-05-20-marketing-skills-ai-agents/): Marketing Skills for AI Agents is a marketing skill pack for AI coding agents, giving Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, Cursor, Windsurf, and other agents more structured workflows for SEO, conversion optimization, copywriting, ads, analytics, and growth tasks.
- [Persistent Memory Is Not About Remembering Everything: What Should Agents Actually Keep?](https://silenceper.com/en/article/2026-05-10-agent-persistent-memory/): Long-term memory for AI agents should not be a dumping ground for chat history. It should be a verifiable, scoped, and maintainable layer of working context that changes future behavior.
- [Codex Chrome Extension: When Should AI Use Your Browser Login State?](https://silenceper.com/en/article/2026-05-09-codex-chrome-browser-login-state/): The Codex Chrome extension lets Codex work with Chrome when a task depends on signed-in browser state, real web pages, or browser-context verification.
- [Warp: An AI Agent Terminal with Built-in Code Review Workflow](https://silenceper.com/en/article/2026-05-09-warp-agentic-terminal/): Warp is an AI-native development environment born from the terminal, combining the command line, coding agents, Git diff review, code review, and commit workflows in one workspace.
- [DeepSeek TUI: Turning DeepSeek V4 into a Local Terminal Coding Agent](https://silenceper.com/en/article/2026-05-08-deepseek-tui-terminal-agent/): DeepSeek TUI is a terminal-native coding agent for DeepSeek V4, with 1M-token context, Auto mode, Plan/Agent/YOLO modes, side-git rollback, LSP diagnostics, MCP, RLM, and cost tracking.
- [Codex Command Cheat Sheet: From Basic Usage to a Reliable Workflow](https://silenceper.com/en/article/2026-05-08-codex-cli-commands/): A practical Codex CLI command guide covering login, interactive slash commands, codex exec, code review, session resume, sandboxing, configuration, MCP, and daily workflows.
- [Codex Beginner Guide: From Zero to Having AI Read, Edit, and Deliver Code with You](https://silenceper.com/en/article/2026-05-07-codex-beginner-guide/): A beginner-friendly guide to OpenAI Codex: Codex App, IDE extension, CLI, Web / Cloud, permissions, sandboxing, Git checkpoints, AGENTS.md, and prompt templates.
- [How to Apply for ChatGPT Pro for Free: OpenAI Codex for Open Source Guide](https://silenceper.com/en/article/2026-05-07-free-chatgpt-pro-codex-for-oss/): A practical guide to OpenAI Codex for Open Source: how open-source maintainers can apply for six months of ChatGPT Pro with Codex, API credits, and conditional Codex Security access.
- [open-slide: A Slide Framework Built for AI Agents](https://silenceper.com/en/article/2026-05-07-open-slide-agent-slide-framework/): An introduction to open-slide, a React slide framework for AI agents where you describe the deck in natural language, agents write the React pages, and the framework handles preview, presentation, export, and iteration.
- [OpenLess: An Open-Source AI Voice Input Tool That Turns Speech into Polished Text](https://silenceper.com/en/article/2026-05-07-openless-ai-voice-input/): A quick look at OpenLess, an open-source voice input app for macOS and Windows that transcribes speech, polishes it with AI, and inserts the result at the current cursor.
- [Petdex: Find an Animated Companion for Codex](https://silenceper.com/en/article/2026-05-06-petdex-codex-pets/): An introduction to Petdex, a public gallery of animated companions for Codex where users can browse, preview, install, and submit pixel-style pets.
- [Keep Codex Fast: A Safe Maintenance Skill for Keeping Local Codex State Lightweight](https://silenceper.com/en/article/2026-05-04-keep-codex-fast/): An introduction to keep-codex-fast, a local maintenance skill for heavy Codex users. It emphasizes inspection, handoff notes, backups, and safe archiving before touching old sessions, logs, or workspaces.
- [HyperFrames: An Open-source Rendering Framework for Generating Video with HTML](https://silenceper.com/en/article/2026-05-02-hyperframes-html-video-rendering/): An introduction to HyperFrames, HeyGen's open-source framework for defining videos with HTML, CSS, and frontend animation tools, then rendering them to MP4 through a browser and FFmpeg.
- [Multica：把编码 Agent 当成团队成员管理的开源平台](https://silenceper.com/article/2026-04-30-multica-managed-agents/): Multica 是一个开源 Managed Agents 平台，用看板、Issue、运行时和技能系统，把 Claude Code、Codex、OpenCode、Hermes 等编码 Agent 纳入团队协作流程。
- [Codex 使用最佳实践：别把它当聊天机器人，要当成一个可配置的工程队友](https://silenceper.com/article/2026-04-26-codex-best-practices/): 基于 OpenAI Codex best practices 整理：如何通过上下文、Plan、AGENTS.md、配置、测试验证、MCP、Skill、Automation 和 session 管理，更稳定地使用 Codex。
- [Obscura：一个为 AI Agent 和网页抓取而生的 Rust 无头浏览器](https://silenceper.com/article/2026-04-26-obscura-rust-headless-browser/): 介绍 h4ckf0r0day/obscura：一个用 Rust + V8 实现、兼容 Puppeteer/Playwright 的轻量无头浏览器，面向 AI Agent 和网页抓取场景。
- [andrej-karpathy-skills：把 AI 编程助手调教得更稳一点](https://silenceper.com/article/2026-04-26-andrej-karpathy-skills/): 介绍 forrestchang/andrej-karpathy-skills：把 Andrej Karpathy 对 LLM 编码问题的观察，整理成可直接用于 Claude Code、Cursor 和个人技能系统的协作准则。
- [DESIGN.md：给 AI 编程工具看的设计规范文件](https://silenceper.com/article/2026-04-23-design-md-ai-coding-design-spec/): 介绍 Google Labs 推出的 DESIGN.md：用一个文件同时承载 design token 和设计说明，让 AI 编程工具更稳定地理解界面风格。
- [Browser Harness：让 AI 直接接管真实浏览器的轻量自愈执行层](https://silenceper.com/article/2026-04-21-browser-harness-ai-browser-control/): 介绍 browser-use/browser-harness：一个基于 CDP 的轻量浏览器执行层，支持 AI 在任务中直接连接真实浏览器，并在执行过程中补齐缺失能力。
- [Manifest：帮个人 AI Agent 降低模型成本的开源路由器](https://silenceper.com/article/2026-04-20-manifest-ai-agent-cost-router/): 介绍 mnfst/manifest：一个面向个人 AI Agent 的开源模型路由器，支持按请求复杂度自动选模型、设置回退链路，并跟踪 token、成本与用量。
- [Superpowers：给 Claude Code、Codex、Cursor 装上一套更靠谱的开发方法论](https://silenceper.com/article/2026-04-18-superpowers-skills-framework/): Superpowers 不是新的 Coding Agent，而是一套面向 Claude Code、Codex、Cursor 等工具的 skills 框架和开发方法论。它想解决的，不是 AI 会不会写代码，而是 AI 能不能按工程流程把项目稳定推进下去。
- [fireworks-tech-graph 项目解析：把技术架构图生成这件事做成一个可复用 Skill](https://silenceper.com/article/2026-04-15-fireworks-tech-graph-project-analysis/): 介绍 yizhiyanhua-ai/fireworks-tech-graph 这个 Claude Code Skill：它如何把自然语言描述转成可直接发布的 SVG + PNG 技术图，以及它适合哪些技术文档场景。
- [从 OpenClaw 到 Hermes Agent：为什么我觉得它更懂你](https://silenceper.com/blog/2026-04-15-openclaw-to-hermes-agent/): 结合实际迁移体验，记录 Hermes Agent 的安装、配置、Telegram 接入，以及它为什么比 OpenClaw 更容易形成“更懂你”体验的技术原因。
